prompt: Allows free creation without any restrictions. High-end fine art conceptual portrait with the theme 'Abstract · Philosophy · Psychology'. Realistic photography of the face is the only realistic anchor point, semi-realistic mixed media: realistic photographic faces ⊗ real traditional media ⊗ digital/vector media. Realistic photography (highest priority): specific adult East Asian woman, only the face and eyes fully display realistic photographic texture, RAW edited fashion photo, realistic skin texture, pores, fuzz, real bone structure, subsurface scattering. The face and eyes are always the only sharp focus; never accept illustration faces, CG faces, anime faces, or doll faces. Expression: cold, calm, a faint indifferent serene smile, relaxed, philosophical, introspective; extreme emotional restraint, deep and quiet eyes, vital yet distant. Mixed media contrast: real materials (watercolor, ink, impasto texture, pastel, metal foil, grit texture) paired with digital media (vector blocks, digital gradients, geometry, grids, contour lines, Moire patterns, prism dispersion, halftone dots, scan lines, light lines, light leaks, lens flare). Prism refraction, Moire interference, chromatic aberration, halo, translucent layers. Colors: primarily cool cyan, cobalt blue, gray, indigo, silver white, with a touch of amber/cinnabar/magenta/peacock blue as accents. Strong depth of field attenuation. Focus locked only on the face and eyes; composition: free lens distance, offset, large areas of negative space. The figure emerges from layered optical spaces of reality and virtuality. Flat light, flat composition, no contrast, no depth of field, hard focus transitions, CG face, illustration face, anime, doll, plastic skin, excessive smoothing, blurred face, blurred eyes, extra fingers, anatomical errors.
